experiment: Phase 4 — Deep Optimization of Top 2 + Hybrid
purpose: 20 epochs on EG V2, NTSO V2, and EG+NTSO Hybrid to determine champion

results.name: Entropy-Gated V2
results.changes_from_v1: Kaiming init, adaptive LR per neuron, stronger decorrelation, 3 layers, wider
results.trajectory: monotonically increasing — never plateaued at 20 epochs
results.verdict: STABLE WINNER — slower start than NTSO but never diverges
results.notes: 3-layer version. Still climbing at ep 20. With 50+ epochs could reach 90%+.

results.name: NTSO V2 (Neuro-Thermodynamic Self-Organization)
results.changes_from_v1: Better plasticity formula, leaky ReLU, stronger reconstruction
results.trajectory: fast rise to 88.9% at ep 6, then gradual decline, NaN at ep 19
results.failure_reason: Temperature annealing creates positive feedback loop. Neurons cool → less plastic → can't correct errors → errors accumulate → NaN explosion at ep 19
results.verdict: ABANDONED — higher peak but fatally unstable
results.lesson: Multi-signal plasticity is powerful but fragile. Competing signals (surprise, disagreement, temperature) create oscillatory instability. SIMPLER IS BETTER.

results.name: EG+NTSO Hybrid
results.changes: Combined EG entropy gate + NTSO surprise + disagreement + temperature
results.trajectory: fast rise to 86% at ep 6, then slow decline to 83% at ep 20
results.failure_reason: Too many competing signals + too deep (4 layers) = stagnation. Temperature damping fights entropy gating.
results.verdict: ABANDONED — hybrid is WORSE than pure EG
results.lesson: Hybridizing local learning rules doesn't help. Each rule has its own attractor, combining them creates conflict. Pure EG with one signal (entropy) is cleanest.

decision: Pure Entropy-Gated wins. NTSO abandoned (unstable). Hybrid abandoned (weaker). Focus all effort on EG V3 with stabilization improvements.
key_insight: Simplicity wins. One gating signal (entropy) > multiple competing signals. Stability > peak performance.
